name: Peppy Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomatoes - whole, cut up (2 cups)
1 teaspoon Salt - optional, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage, onion, celery, and carrot in a skillet until meat is lightly browned.
2. Drain excess fat. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, salt, oregano, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper. Simmer, uncovered, for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Cook lasagna according to package instructions; drain well.
4. Combine ricotta, Parmesan, eggs, parsley, remaining pepper, and any additional seasoning (e.g., Tabasco or Italian seasoning) in a bowl.
5. Place half the noodles in a greased baking dish. Spread with half the cheese filling, mozzarella, and meat sauce.
6. Repeat layers of noodles, cheese mixture, and meat sauce.
7. Bake uncovered at 375°F for 30 minutes. Let stand 10 to 15 minutes before serving.
8. Cut into squares and serve.
Serves 10 to 12.
